induction_input: The report the manager submitted failed.
The bill the senator proposed passed.
The cake the baker made disappeared.
The book the author wrote sold.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences using reduced object relative clauses, following the pattern: "The [thing] the [person] [verb] [verb]."
induced_prompt: Write sentences using reduced object relative clauses, following the pattern: "The [thing] the [person] [verb] [verb]."
l2_sentences: The book the teacher recommended disappeared.
The letter the soldier wrote survived.
The painting the artist created sold.
The plan the manager proposed failed.
The song the musician composed enchanted.
l1_sentences: The report the manager submitted failed.
The bill the senator proposed passed.
The cake the baker made disappeared.
